findings.title: Photo URLs unescaped in img src attributes
findings.description: 12 locations insert photo URLs into img src without escaping. esc() function exists but was not applied consistently.
findings.exploit_scenario: Attacker compromises admin or finds RLS bypass -> modifies photos JSONB array with malicious URL containing onerror handler -> stored XSS executes for all users viewing that profile
findings.impact: Stored XSS. Session hijacking, admin account takeover.
findings.recommendation: Apply esc() to all photo URL insertions in template literals. FIXED in this audit.

findings.title: Migration DROP wrong function signature for auto_match_if_mutual
findings.description: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS auto_match_if_mutual() uses zero args but actual function takes (TEXT). Old gender-restricted version survives migration.
findings.exploit_scenario: Admin runs migration -> no errors -> old gender-restricted function remains -> same-gender matching silently fails -> inclusivity feature broken
findings.impact: Inclusivity refactor fails silently. Same-gender couples cannot match via mutual favorites.
findings.recommendation: Change to DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS auto_match_if_mutual(text). FIXED in this audit.
